title: Architect API integration in Azure
summary: Learn how to architect API integration in Azure, and provide secure, scalable API access for your applications.

sections.title: Architect API integration in Azure
sections.summary: Learn how to architect API integration in Azure, and provide secure, scalable API access for your applications.

lessons.title: Explore API Management
lessons.content_md:
Learn how the API Management service functions, how to transform and secure APIs, and how to create a backend API.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-api-management/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Manage your generative AI APIs with Azure API Management
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage generative AI APIs with Azure API Management.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/api-management/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage your generative AI APIs with Azure API Management

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Architect API integration in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Architect API integration in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
